name: ssot-tb-goal
description: SSOT→TB outcome-driven (3 goals): real TB on disk + iverilog clean + vvp PASS or [SIM ESCALATE]. Replaces 9-step ssot-tb for hallucination-prone models — fewer tasks = fewer fake-DONE opportunities.

tasks.content: [Goal 1/3] Produce TB+TC on disk passing iverilog compile
tasks.detail:
End state required:
  • <ip>/tc/tc_<ip>.sv  ≥ 1 KB  (real V2001 task body)
  • <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv  ≥ 0.5 KB (real top-level)
  • <ip>/list/<ip>.f references all 7 RTL + tb + tc
  • iverilog -g2012 -f <ip>/list/<ip>.f -o /tmp/<ip>.out 2>&1 → exit 0
Do whatever needed: read SSOT, read RTL, write_file, run_command. No prose-only turns. The validator (check_tb_disk.sh) reads the disk — fake reasons fail.
tasks.exit_condition: real artifacts on disk, iverilog clean

tasks.content: [Goal 2/3] Run vvp + capture sim_report.txt with disk-verified PASS
tasks.detail:
End state required:
  • <ip>/sim/<ip>.out (or <ip>_simv) compiled binary on disk
  • <ip>/sim/sim_report.txt with positive pass signature ('all PASS' OR 'All N tests passed' OR '0 errors, 0 warnings')
  • NO failure markers ([FAIL], 'N FAILED' with N>0, 'got=0xxx', FATAL, Aborted)
If sim has failures → DO NOT mark approved. Instead: jump to Goal 3 ([SIM ESCALATE]) OR fix RTL/TB and retry.
The validator (check_sim_disk.sh) reads the report on disk — claiming PASS in prose without backing artifact fails.
tasks.exit_condition: sim_report.txt has all PASS, no FAIL markers

tasks.content: [Goal 3/3] Output [SSOT RESULT] tb-gen DONE OR [SIM ESCALATE]
tasks.detail:
Decision branch based on Goal 2 outcome:

— If Goal 2 reached PASS:
  Emit:
    [SSOT RESULT] tb-gen DONE
    Module    : <ip>
    TB        : <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv (cite line count)
    TC        : <ip>/tc/tc_<ip>.sv (cite line count)
    Simulator : iverilog | VCS
    Tests     : N scenarios, M scoreboard checks
    Result    : 0 errors, 0 warnings; M/M PASS
    Handoff   : ssot-gen

— If Goal 2 had failures (DUT bugs): emit each bug as a [SIM ESCALATE] block:
    [SIM ESCALATE] → rtl-gen
    Module    : <ip>
    File      : <ip>/rtl/<file>.v
    Test      : <SCx test name>
    Expected  : <value from tc_>
    Got       : <verbatim from sim_report.txt>
    Hypothesis: <one-line guess at RTL fix>
  One block per failing test. Do NOT silently approve when sim has failures.

Approvable only when (PASS path → real DONE block) OR (FAIL path → SIM ESCALATE blocks emitted).
